source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Air enters the turbocharger compressor of an automotive engine at 100 kPa, 30\circ\text{C} and exits at 200 kPa. The air is cooled by 50\circ\text{C} in an intercooler before entering the engine. The isentropic efficiency of the compressor is 75%. Determine the temperature of the air entering the engine.
